data.name: RequiredField
data.value: {0} is required.

data.name: FieldNotFound
data.value: {0} could not be found.

data.name: InvalidEmail
data.value: {0} is invalid.

data.name: MinLength
data.value: {0} must be at least {1} characters long.

data.name: PasswordMinLength
data.value: Password must be at least {0} characters long.

data.name: PasswordUppercase
data.value: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.

data.name: PasswordLowercase
data.value: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.

data.name: PasswordNumber
data.value: Password must contain at least one number.

data.name: PasswordSpecialCharacter
data.value: Password must contain at least one special character.

data.name: LoginInvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid username or password.

data.name: Success
data.value: Your action was completed successfully.

data.name: RegisterUsernameExists
data.value: Username already exists.

data.name: RegisterEmailExists
data.value: Email already exists.

data.name: InvalidToken
data.value: Invalid token.

data.name: ConfirmEmailSubject
data.value: Account Confirmation

data.name: ConfirmEmailBody
data.value:
You're almost done with your registration, @{0}!

Thank you for registering with us.

Please click the link below to confirm your email address:

Confirm Email

The confirmation link will expire in {2} minutes.

If you did not register for this account, please ignore this email.

data.name: AccountConfirmedSubject
data.value: Account Confirmed

data.name: AccountConfirmedBody
data.value:
Welcome @{0}!

Thank you for confirming your email address. Your account is now fully activated.

You can now access your account and start using our platform.

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to contact our support team.

data.name: NoPendingConfirmation
data.value: No pending confirmation was found for this email address.

data.name: InvalidResetToken
data.value: Invalid or expired password reset token.

data.name: PasswordResetSubject
data.value: Password Reset

data.name: PasswordResetBody
data.value:
Password Reset Request, @{0}!

We received a request to reset the password for your account.

Click the link below to set a new password:

Reset Password

This link will expire in {2} minutes.

If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email. Your password will not change.

data.name: PasswordResetConfirmedSubject
data.value: Password Changed Successfully

data.name: PasswordResetConfirmedBody
data.value:
Your password has been changed, @{0}!

Your account password was recently updated.

If you made this change, no further action is required.

If you did not change your password, please contact our support team immediately.

data.name: EmailCooldown
data.value: You may request another email in {0} seconds.
